initial_candidates.sql: SELECT DISTINCT account_id FROM account WHERE account_id NOT IN (SELECT account_id FROM loan) AND district_id IN (SELECT district_id FROM district WHERE A10 > 8000 AND A10 <= 9000)

SELECT DISTINCT account.account_id
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.A10 > 8000
  AND district.A10 <= 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT account.type
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.A10 > 8000 AND district.A10 <= 9000
EXCEPT
SELECT DISTINCT account.type
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'A';

SELECT DISTINCT account.account_id
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.A10 > 8000 AND district.A10 <= 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT 'non_eligible' AS account_type
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.A10 > 8000
  AND district.A10 <= 9000;

aggregation.selected_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT 'non_eligible' AS account_type
FROM account
JOIN district ON account.district_id = district.district_id
JOIN loan ON account.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE district.A10 > 8000
  AND district.A10 <= 9000;
